name: enrichment-stability
description: Multi-universe enrichment analysis with perturbation-based stability scoring for gene set enrichment (GSEA)
capabilities: Four universe construction strategies (GTF-based, detection threshold, expression-filtered, low-count pruned)
Fisher exact test and GSEA rank-based enrichment testing
input_files: DEG file (CSV with gene_id, log2fc, pvalue)
Gene set database (GMT or JSON format)
Optional: count matrix for universe building
Optional: GTF file for all-annotated universe
output_files: stability_report.json - stability scores and unstable pathways
usage: python EnrichmentStability.py --deg-file DEGs.csv --gene-set-db gene_sets.json --count-matrix counts.csv --output-dir results --use-gsea
